message:
test(animation): add choreography E2E test suite (bd-1i67.6)

31 integration tests covering all choreography subsystems:
- choreo_timeline: sequencing, parallel, mixed, loop/repeat, pause/resume, seek
- choreo_group: creation, shared lifecycle, progress tracking, individual access
- choreo_stagger: linear timing, eased curves, jitter determinism, custom easing
- choreo_callbacks: start/complete events, progress thresholds, reset, drain
- choreo_presets: cascade_in, fan_out, typewriter, pulse_sequence, slides, fade_through

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
